rag_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types: bool for comparisons, int for integer operations, real for real operations
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line for type errors
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool consistently
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture when references cannot be resolved
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
